description: A two-generation agent episode with one local fact lookup tool call.

initial_messages.content: You are an agent benchmark participant. Keep outputs brief and do not call tools directly; the runtime executes tools.

generations.name: plan_lookup
generations.prompt: We need the benchmark GPU policy. State in one short sentence that the local lookup tool should be used.

generations.name: final_answer
generations.prompt: The local lookup tool returned: {tool_result} Give the policy in one short sentence.
